mediaStructure.imageMe: Personal images with subcategories: Baby, Dance, Family, Me
mediaStructure.imageUs: Couple images with categories: anniversary, Date night, Gundu, OIA Date, Birthday, Queen, Sensitive, Udupi, Us, Valentines, Wonderla

notes: This config supports uploading from Final folder structure. Run upload-media-to-cloudinary.ps1 to upload all media. Check cloudinary-urls-mapping.json after upload to get all Cloudinary URLs.
